meta.ministry: Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions, Department of Administrative Reforms and Public Grievances
meta.project_subject: Setting up of PMU for CPGRAMS with 5 resource persons for a period beyond 31-3-25
meta.deliverables: 1. Review and streamlining existing categorization/taxonomy and mapping across all Central Ministries/Departments (to be completed in two months). 2. Monthly data analysis and reports including: root cause analysis of grievances suggesting systemic reform, analysis of feedback, analysis of disposal of grievances and performance of GROS, and any other detailed custom analysis as desired by DARPG. 3. Study of Public Grievances System for select Ministries/Departments and States/UTs to understand grievance flow and bottlenecks (to be completed in 3 months). 4. Category analysis of grievances for States/UTs/Local bodies for universalization of 7.0 (to be completed in three months). 5. Any other work as assigned by DARPG from time to time.

content.full_text: This work order extends the Project Management Unit (PMU) of Quality Council of India (QCI) for CPGRAMS at a cost of Rs.40,32,000/- (excluding taxes) for 6 months from 01-04-2025 to 30-09-2025 or until NextGen CPGRAMS implementation, whichever is earlier. The PMU will consist of 5 QCI professionals (5 members from 01.04.2025 to 30-06-2025, then 3 members till 30-09-2025). The deliverables include reviewing and streamlining categorization/taxonomy across Central Ministries, monthly data analysis reports, studying public grievance systems, category analysis for universalization, and any other assigned work. Payment milestones are spread over 6 months with 20% after 1st and 2nd months, and 15% for months 3-6. The work order was issued by DARPG on 13th May 2024.
